response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the entire video. 2. Identified three VTubers (Kobo Kanaeru, Kaela Kovalskia, Zeta) engaged in a continuous conversation. 3. Monitored audio for any vocal musical performances. 4. Confirmed background music is instrumental only; no vocal songs are being performed.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a conversation between VTubers Kobo Kanaeru, Kaela Kovalskia, and Zeta discussing their upcoming concert 'Chromatic Future'.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru, Kaela Kovalskia, and Zeta discuss their upcoming concert 'Chromatic Future', mentioning it is the first time all nine Hololive Indonesia members will perform together.
